Ira - Doubt Wale
online
📷 NCERT Photo
x + 5 = 12 solve karo
4:32 pm
Namaste! Main Ira 😊 Direct answer nahi dungi, par saath mein solve karenge!
4:32 pm
Step 1: x ko akela chahiye. Dono sides se 5 minus karo.
4:32 pm
Step 2: Left: x+5-5 = x. Right: 12-5 = 7
4:32 pm
Step 3: Toh x = 7. Check: 7+5=12 ✅ Samjhe?
4:33 pm
Haan didi! Easy tha 🙏
4:33 pm
Sir triangles ka area kaise nikalte hain? Base 8cm height 5cm
5:10 pm
Great question! Main Kabir. Chalo 3 steps mein karte hain.
5:10 pm
Step 1: Formula yaad hai? Area = ½ × base × height
5:10 pm
Step 2: Values daalo → ½ × 8 × 5
5:11 pm
Step 3: Calculate karo → ½ × 40 = 20 cm². Ab tum try karo base=10, height=6
5:11 pm
½×60=30! Ho gaya sir 😄
5:12 pm
